calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-03-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC. Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award is taken off calendar as moot. Dismissal of entire action, of all parties and all causes of action, with prejudice filed by Plaintiff on October 30, 2015. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
